name: Hapi, Guidance of Horus
name_jp: ホルスの<ruby lang="jp"><rb>先</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>せん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>導</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>どう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－ハーピ
desc: If you control "King's Sarcophagus", you can Special Summon this card (from your GY). You can only Special Summon "Hapi, Guidance of Horus" once per turn this way. If another card(s) you control leaves the field by an opponent's card effect, while this card is in your Monster Zone (except during the Damage Step): You can target 2 cards that are banished and/or in the GYs; either add both to the hand or shuffle both into the Deck. You can only use this effect of "Hapi, Guidance of Horus" once per turn.
mnst_eff: If you control "King's Sarcophagus", you can Special Summon this card (from your GY). You can only Special Summon "Hapi, Guidance of Horus" once per turn this way. If another card(s) you control leaves the field by an opponent's card effect, while this card is in your Monster Zone (except during the Damage Step): You can target 2 cards that are banished and/or in the GYs; either add both to the hand or shuffle both into the Deck. You can only use this effect of "Hapi, Guidance of Horus" once per turn.

sets.set: THE CHRONICLES DECK: Spirit Charmers (All-Foil Edition)

jp_sets.set: THE CHRONICLES DECK: Spirit Charmers (All-Foil Edition)

action: Activates if other cards leave the field
Adds banished cards to the hand
Returns banished cards to the Deck
summoning: Special Summons itself from your Graveyard
Special Summon by its own condition once per turn
